title: Immunoperoxidase Histology and Densitometric Quantification for Tyrosine Hydroxylase
author: Roberta Marongiu

steps.title: Select one SN and one striatal section per animal
steps.instruction: Select one SN and one striatal section per animal.

steps.title: Pool tissue sections from all experimental...
steps.instruction: Pool tissue sections from all experimental groups into a single container to ensure identical reagent exposure.

steps.title: Punch code the cortex of the...
steps.instruction: Punch code the cortex of the sections to allow for identification after pooling.

steps.title: Rinse
steps.instruction: Rinse: Wash sections in 0.1M PB followed by 0.1M TS (90 rpm).

steps.title: ABC Incubation
steps.instruction: ABC Incubation: Wash in TS and incubate in ABC complex (at 50% of the manufacturer’s recommended dilution) for 30 min.

steps.title: Secondary Antibody
steps.instruction: Secondary Antibody: Rinse in TS, then incubate in biotin-conjugated donkey anti-sheep IgG (1:400) in 0.1% BSA/TS.

steps.title: Primary Antibody
steps.instruction: Primary Antibody: Incubate in sheep anti-TH (1:5000) in 0.1% Triton-X/0.1% BSA/TS.

steps.title: Block
steps.instruction: Block: Incubate in 0.5% BSA in TS for 30 min (90 rpm).

steps.title: 24 hours at Room Temperature ( 145 rpm )
steps.instruction: 24 hours at Room Temperature ( 145 rpm ).

steps.title: 24 hours at 4 degrees ( 145 rpm )
steps.instruction: 24 hours at 4 degrees ( 145 rpm ).

steps.title: DAB Reaction
steps.instruction: DAB Reaction: Visualize bound peroxidase using DAB and 0.003% H2O2 in TS for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Clearing & Coverslipping
steps.instruction: Clearing & Coverslipping: Clear in Xylene and coverslip using DPX.

steps.title: Dehydration
steps.instruction: Dehydration: Run slides through an ascending alcohol series (e.g., 70%, 95%, 100%).

steps.title: Mounting
steps.instruction: Mounting: Mount sections in 0.05 M PB onto gelatin-coated glass slides.

steps.title: Use the Nikon Eclipse 80i and Micropublisher 5
steps.instruction: Use the Nikon Eclipse 80i and Micropublisher 5.0 camera to capture images.

steps.title: Utilize IP Lab software for consistent digital acquisition
steps.instruction: Utilize IP Lab software for consistent digital acquisition.

steps.title: Ensure the investigator performing acquisition is...
steps.instruction: Ensure the investigator performing acquisition is blinded to the experimental conditions.

steps.title: Open images in ImageJ64
steps.instruction: Open images in ImageJ64 .

steps.title: Convert pixel density to transmittance values for final analysis
steps.instruction: Convert pixel density to transmittance values for final analysis.

steps.title: Define Regions of Interest (ROI) in the striatal regions
steps.instruction: Define Regions of Interest (ROI) in the striatal regions.

description: Subtract this background value from the ROI density to control for illumination variability. Background Subtraction: Measure pixel density in a non-labeled region (e.g., anterior commissure).
